skill.name: klaviyo-automation
skill.description: Automate Klaviyo tasks via Rube MCP (Composio): manage email/SMS campaigns, inspect campaign messages, track tags, and monitor send jobs. Always search tools first for current schemas.
skill.summary: Automate Klaviyo tasks via Rube MCP (Composio): manage email/SMS campaigns, inspect campaign message...
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All 56 static findings are false positives. The skill is documentation for Klaviyo marketing automation via Rube MCP. Detected 'external_commands' are MCP tool names (e.g., KLAVIYO_GET_CAMPAIGNS), not shell executions. The 'network' flag references a legitimate MCP server URL. No cryptographic code or malicious patterns exist. This is a safe, community-contributed integration skill.

content.user_title: Automate Klaviyo Email and SMS Campaigns
content.value_statement: Automate Klaviyo marketing operations including campaign management, message inspection, tag tracking, and send job monitoring through Composio's Rube MCP integration.
actual_capabilities: List and filter email and SMS campaigns with channel and status filters
Get detailed campaign information including audiences and scheduling
Inspect campaign message content for email and SMS
Track and manage campaign tags for organization
Monitor campaign send job status and delivery progress
Handle pagination and filtering for large campaign datasets
limitations: Requires Rube MCP connection to Composio platform
Needs active Klaviyo account with API access
Rate limits apply: 10 requests per second burst, 150 per minute steady
Tag endpoint has stricter limits: 3 per second burst, 60 per minute

use_cases.title: Marketing Team Campaign Management
use_cases.description: Browse, filter, and inspect email and SMS campaigns to understand performance and content

use_cases.title: Automated Workflow Integration
use_cases.description: Build automated workflows that check campaign status and send progress

use_cases.title: Campaign Content Audit
use_cases.description: Extract and review campaign message content for compliance and consistency checks

prompt_templates.title: List Recent Email Campaigns
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the klaviyo-automation skill to list the 10 most recent email campaigns. Show their names, status, and created dates.

prompt_templates.title: Get Campaign Details
prompt_templates.prompt: Find a campaign named 'Newsletter' and get its full details including any tags and send status.

prompt_templates.title: Inspect Campaign Messages
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the message content for campaign ID 01GDDKASAP8TKDDA2GRZDSVP4H. Show the subject line, from email, and HTML content.

prompt_templates.title: Monitor Send Job Status
prompt_templates.prompt: Check the send job status for a campaign I just sent. Show whether it is queued, in progress, complete, or failed.

best_practices: Always call RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS first to get current tool schemas before starting
Verify Rube MCP connection status shows ACTIVE before running any workflows
Handle pagination properly - default page size is ~10 campaigns, paginate to get all results
Validate campaign status client-side as server-side filtering may return mixed results
anti_patterns: Assuming all campaigns fit in a single response without pagination
Using case-insensitive status filters - Klaviyo status strings are case-sensitive
Skipping connection status verification before running workflows
Ignoring rate limits which can result in blocked requests

faq.question: What is Rube MCP?
faq.answer: Rube MCP is a Model Context Protocol server by Composio that provides access to various integrations including Klaviyo. It allows Claude to interact with Klaviyo's API through standardized tool calls.

faq.question: Do I need API keys for Klaviyo?
faq.answer: No. The skill uses Rube MCP which handles authentication through OAuth with your Klaviyo account. You only need to connect your Klaviyo account through the Rube connection flow.

faq.question: What rate limits apply?
faq.answer: Standard endpoints allow 10 requests per second burst and 150 per minute. Tag endpoints have stricter limits at 3 per second burst and 60 per minute. Implement backoff on 429 responses.

faq.question: Can I send campaigns with this skill?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides read-only capabilities for listing, retrieving, and monitoring campaigns. Send operations require different API permissions and are not included.

faq.question: How do I filter campaigns by status?
faq.answer: Use the filter parameter with Klaviyo's filter syntax like equals(status,"draft") or equals(status,"sent"). Note that status strings are case-sensitive.

faq.question: Why do I need to paginate?
faq.answer: Klaviyo's API returns a default page of ~10 campaigns per request. For full coverage of all campaigns, you must follow the page_cursor until no more cursor is returned.
